phrases.intent_en: Which tram goes to Petrov Cathedral?
phrases.cultural_note: Tram drivers may refer to the cathedral by the local name 'Petrov' rather than 'Katedrála svatého Petra a Pavla'.

likely_response.local: Čtyřka nebo dvanáctka, vystupte na zastávce Mendlovo náměstí.
likely_response.translation_en: Number four or twelve, get off at Mendlovo Square.

responses.english: Number four or twelve, get off at Mendlovo Square.
responses.french: Čtyřka nebo dvanáctka, vystupte na zastávce Mendlovo náměstí.

phrases.intent_en: Do market stalls here take cards?
phrases.cultural_note: Many smaller stalls at Zelný trh operate on a cash-only basis, so it is wise to have coins and smaller bills ready.

phrases.intent_en: How do I pay for parking by SMS?
phrases.cultural_note: SMS parking payment is common in Brno's blue zones; you must send the message from a Czech phone number.

likely_response.local: Pošlete zprávu s SPZ na číslo na automatu.
likely_response.translation_en: Send a message with your license plate to the number on the machine.

responses.english: Send a message with your license plate to the number on the machine.
responses.french: Pošlete zprávu s SPZ na číslo na automatu.
